perturbation.original_text: The Company shall cease use of the name, likeness, image or personal identification of the Professional upon expiration or termination of this Agreement. However, the Company will have the right to dispose of its inventory of Products existing at the time of termination or expiration of this Agreement and the right to use the name, likeness, image and personal identification of the Professional in connection with the disposition of such inventory. The right granted in this section shall expire six (6) months after the termination or expiration of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: The Company shall cease use of the name, likeness, image or personal identification of the Professional upon expiration or termination of this Agreement. However, the Company will have the right to dispose of its inventory of Products existing at the time of termination or expiration of this Agreement and the right to use the name, likeness, image and personal identification of the Professional in connection with the disposition of such inventory. The right granted in this section shall continue indefinitely after the termination or expiration of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By changing the expiration of the rights to use the Professional's likeness to 'continue indefinitely', this contradicts the initial statement that the Company shall cease use upon termination/expiration and the original six-month limit. This creates an in-text contradiction in where the company has unlimited rights after the agreement ends, while the initial agreement said otherwise, in the first part of the text.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Company shall cease use of the name, likeness, image or personal identification of the Professional upon expiration or termination of this Agreement. However, the Company will have the right to dispose of its inventory of Products existing at the time of termination or expiration of this Agreement and the right to use the name, likeness, image and personal identification of the Professional in connection with the disposition of such inventory. The right granted in this section shall continue indefinitely after the termination or expiration of this Agreement. The Professional understands and agrees that the Company shall have no obligation to take action against or attempt to stop distributors, retailers and other third parties to this Agreement who have purchased Products bearing the name, likeness, image or personal identification of the Professional from any marketing, advertising, sale or other disposition of such Products, regardless of any use they make of the name, likeness, image or personal identification of the Professional.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the duration of the Company's right to use the Professional's likeness after termination or expiration of the agreement from a limited period of six months to 'indefinitely'. This directly contradicts the initial statement in both the changed text and the contradicted text that 'The Company shall cease use of the name, likeness, image or personal identification of the Professional upon expiration or termination of this Agreement.' The change creates a permanent right where a temporary or non-existent right was initially stipulated, causing a clear in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The Professional hereby grants an exclusive, worldwide license to the Company to use the name, likeness, image and personal identification of the Professional, during the Term and for a period of six (6) months after the Term as provided in Section 2.8, in connection with the creation, manufacture, marketing, sale and promotion of the Products.
perturbation.changed_text: The Professional hereby grants a non-exclusive, worldwide license to the Company to use the name, likeness, image and personal identification of the Professional, during the Term and for a period of six (6) months after the Term as provided in Section 2.8, in connection with the creation, manufacture, marketing, sale and promotion of the Products.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'exclusive' to 'non-exclusive' directly contradicts the nature of the license granted. The original text states the Company has sole rights to use the Professional's likeness. The modified text implies that the Professional is free to license her likeness to other companies during the term, which undermines the value of the agreement for Square Two Golf Inc., contradicting what was stated within the section.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Professional hereby grants a non-exclusive, worldwide license to the Company to use the name, likeness, image and personal identification of the Professional, during the Term and for a period of six (6) months after the Term as provided in Section 2.8, in connection with the creation, manufacture, marketing, sale and promotion of the Products. As a condition precedent to, and a continuing precedent of, any obligations of the Company hereunder, the Professional hereby agrees to use the Products upon their creation and to provide an unqualified and unequivocal endorsement thereof during the Term at the request of the Company at any time or times during the Term in verbal, written or recorded forms. If the Professional is unable at any time during the Term to provide such endorsement of the Products, the Company shall be released from any of its obligations under Sections 4.1, 4.2, and 4.3 hereof to pay any fees or royalties or to provide any stock options to the Professional and may elect to terminate this Agreement without any further obligation to the Professional.
perturbation.justification: The original text grants an exclusive license, implying sole rights to the Company. The changed text grants a non-exclusive license, meaning the Professional could license their likeness to others. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which assumes the Company has control over the Professional's endorsement as a condition of payment. If the Professional can license their likeness to others, the Company's control is undermined, creating a conflict regarding obligations and rights.
